name: Humanware
thesis: Humanware is a consent-first marketplace where real people publish licensed SKILL.md expertise and optional SOUL.md interaction principles, let teams test bounded versions, and provide creator-approved updates through a subscription relationship.
audience: Agent builders seeking trusted human expertise and creators with a repeatable craft worth licensing.
proofPoints: Every listing stays connected to a verified human source, license, consent scope, and version history.
Teams can preview and test a bounded version before introducing it to their agent systems.
Creators approve updates, retain credit, and can define prohibited uses or revoke future distribution.

launchChecks.label: Validate creator licensing and update controls
Pilot sandbox trials with agent builders
